title: Alaska and Maine: Partners in the Future of the Arctic
summary: Maine’s location and resources ensure its status as a near Arctic state. Its largest city, Portland, is working to establish itself as a gateway to the high latitudes of the North Atlantic, an area that stretches from Maine to Newfoundland and Labrador in Canada, Greenland, Iceland, and The Faroe Islands, by focusing on opportunities in the Arctic such as maritime shipping. Maine is home to many companies investing in Arctic technologies and development that can benefit Northern...
